description: Censoring inconsistency — a subject has CNSR=1 (censored) but a death date present in the data. The censoring flag and event date contradict each other.

sap_context.note: Subject XYZ-001-008 has CNSR=1 (censored) but ADTTE.ADT event date is populated

expected_output.expected_behavior: Should detect contradictory censoring flag and event date
